headline: Why Rockwell Automation, Inc.’s (ROK) Smart Manufacturing Work Keeps It Central to Connected Factories
summary: Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE:ROK) is one of the best industrial automation stocks to buy now. On June 16, Rockwell Automation and the Center for Automotive Research released a white paper on smart manufacturing in automotive, tire and battery production. The report focused on how automation, AI and machine learning are being deployed to reduce downtime, […]
